title: 2025–2026 law firm orders litigation
summary: Court challenges to executive actions targeting law firms raised First and Fifth Amendment issues.

title: 2025–2026 religion and state initiatives
summary: The administration created religion-related initiatives that may warrant Establishment Clause scrutiny depending on implementation.

title: 2026 birthright citizenship litigation
summary: Lower courts reportedly found the administration’s birthright-citizenship policy inconsistent with the Fourteenth Amendment and federal law.

title: 2026 Iran war-powers dispute
summary: Congressional and expert criticism of the administration’s Iran campaign raised war-powers and international-law concerns.
